raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta dshwoja Mewibosets
Jerusaleme / tapehz ka wiſch
weenumeſr ehde pee ta Rehnixa
Galda: Un wiſch bija tifis us
abbejahm Rahjahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta X. Nodalla.
Dabwids fuhta Wehſus pee Anona to Am,
moniteru Rehnixa : 1. Kas teem tahs
Bohrdas un Drehbes apgraisa : 4. Tapehz
nahk Dahwids ar faweem faudim ar leelu
Karra-Spehku prett wiſnu/ un teem Sih-
rereem : 6. Un iſdelde tohs papreefschu zaur
Joabu/un pehbigi wiſch pats : 13/17.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N pehz to nomirre to
U Ammona Behrnu Reh-
niſch/ un wiſna Dehls
Anons tappe var Rehnixu wiſ-
na Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Dahwids : Es
darrischu Schehlastibu pee Ano-
na Nakafa Dehla/ itt ka wiſna
Tehws Schehlastibu pee man dar-
rijs. Un Dahwids fuhtija / un
likke zaur faweem Kalpeem wiſ-
nu eepreezinaht pahr wiſna Teh-
wu/ un Dahwida Kalpi nahze us
to Ammona Behrnu Semmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Ammona Behr-
nu Leeli-Kungi us fawu Kungu
Anonu: Woj Dahwids eezeeni
tawn Tehwu preeſch tawahin
Azzim/ ka wiſch Eepreezetajns
pee tew fuhtijs irr? neggi Dah-
wids par to irr fawus Kalpus
fuhtijs / ka wiſch fcho Pilstahtn
istkaufa/untsluhko/un apgahsch?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nehme Anons Dah-
wida Kalpus/ un nodſinne teem
puſs Bahrdn / un nogreese teem
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad tee nu Dahwidant n
ta Sinnu deue / tad fuhtijs
wiſch teem pretti/ jo fchee Wi-
ri bija fohti apsmeeti. Un ta
Rehnixſch likke teem fazzizht: Pa-
leezeet Jerikufa / teekams juh-
Bahrdn buhs atanguſi / un ta-
nahzeet atpakak.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Ammona Behr-
redſeja / ka tee few finirdochu-
bij darrijuschees pee Dahwida-
tad nofuhtijs Ammona Behrn-
un faderreja no teem Sihrexe-
ta Namina Rekaba/ un no teer
Sihrexeem no Jobas diwideſmi-
tuhſtoſchus Kahjincekus / ua n-
ta Rehnixa no Maakas tuhſte-
chus Wihrus/ un no teem Wi-
reem no * Toba diwipeadefini-
tuhſtoſchus Wihrus.
* Sohg: Gr: 11, 3.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad Dahwids to dsirdeja-
fuhtija wiſch Joabu ar wiſ-
Karra-Spehku to Warreno.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad isgahje Ammona-
Behrni/ un taiſijahs us Kautch-
nu preekſch to Wahrtu Durwin-
bet tee Sihrexi no Jobas/ un R-
kabs/ un tee Wihri no Toba/u-
Maakas bija tewitchki Lauka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Joabs redſeja / tas Karſch prett wiſnu taiſiht-
bija/ no Preekſchas un no pa-
katnes / tad islaſtija wiſch n-
wiffeem jauneem Wihreemi n-
Israeka/ un taiſijahs teem Si-
rexeem pretti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tohs zittus Laudi-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
